message:
test(a11y): update accessibility snapshots and add new test coverage

Accessibility snapshot updates (crates/ftui-demo-showcase/tests/):
- a11y_snapshots.rs: Refactor test structure for cleaner assertions
- Update 50+ snapshot files for dashboard, data_viz, forms_input,
  shakespeare, widget_gallery screens across multiple viewport sizes
  (40x10 tiny, 80x24 standard, 120x40 large, 200x50 wide)
- Cover all accessibility modes: high_contrast, large_text, reduced_motion
- Combination mode snapshots: all_modes, high_contrast_large_text

ftui-extras crate updates:
- Cargo.toml: Dependency version updates
- markdown.rs: Table rendering improvements
- mermaid.rs: Diagram parsing enhancements
- syntax.rs: Syntax highlighting refinements
- visual_fx/effects/canvas_adapters.rs: Canvas effect improvements
- visual_fx/effects/plasma.rs: Plasma effect refinements

New test files in ftui-extras/tests/:
- markdown_table_snapshots.rs: Table rendering snapshot tests
- table_theme_parity.rs: Theme consistency verification
- Snapshots: markdown_table_alignment.ansi.snap, markdown_table_basic.ansi.snap,
  markdown_table_max_width.ansi.snap

ftui-harness crate updates:
- Cargo.toml: Test harness dependency updates
- main.rs: Harness entry point refinements
- time_travel.rs: Time-travel debugging improvements
- tests/widget_snapshots.rs: Widget snapshot test updates
- New snapshots: table_fit_content_wide_glyphs.snap,
  table_layout_padding_row_height.snap, table_theme_aurora_*.ansi.snap,
  table_theme_graphite_*.ansi.snap

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
